Points.$Comment: Lower the In, to decrease cluster size

Inputs.$Comment: This masks it so it doesn't go into the ground and interferes with caves
A semi-magic number to center the warp around our height, roughly around 100Y on the global height

Queue.$Comment: Adds White sand between 0 and 25 degrees of the terrain
Adds Limestone via the rotated simplex displacement density
Masks the stalactites for white sandstone

$FloatingNodes.$Comment: Is used to switch with the mtl provider above, to see the shapes clearly

$Comments.$text:
First lowered a bit to expand the masking radius, then inverted.

As to expand the area in which the stalactites can spawn, so it blends properly with the base terrain
Used to clear surroundings, so i have a focused view with /viewport --radius X
Used to mask stalactites, as to not spawn everywhere, but rather in clusters
3 Sizes, the lower they get, the bigger they are
Warp the terrain to meet the heightmap (roughly)
